summary: City Eye full backend (18 pytest) + frontend (Playwright) integration tests executed. Backend 100% pass: auth (register/login/logout/me cookies), 3 roles, /api/analyze/image (YOLOv8 returned valid counts/density/signal), /api/uploads static serving, role-gated /police flag-unflag, ownership 403, /analytics/summary aggregation, list endpoints. Frontend critical flows verified: landing, admin (analyzer) login -> dashboard, analyzer portal stats render, role-based nav (analyzer sees Analytics, no Police link), police register -> Police nav link appears, police portal loads. Two playwright sub-checks failed due to TEST-SCRIPT issues only (hidden file input visibility wait & a strict assertion that misread visible nav element); screenshots/network confirm UI is functional.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs 'width(-1) and height(-1)' warnings on first render — charts still display but minHeight on container would silence noise

action_items: Optional: set explicit min-height on ResponsiveContainer parents in AnalyzerPortal.jsx to remove recharts width/height(-1) warnings

FRONTEND_URL in /app/backend/.env (9b0cf315-...) does not match deployed REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (vehicle-detect-6.preview...). Same-origin today so CORS not triggered, but if frontend ever served from a different host the allow_origins list will reject it — keep these in sync.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: register endpoint has Literal role validator already, the extra `if body.role not in VALID_ROLES` check is dead code (Pydantic rejects first). Harmless.

server.py video flow saves the raw video to original/ but only the extracted JPEG frame is annotated; the response sets media_type='video' but original_url points to the .mp4 — frontend AnalysisDetail likely renders for original (potential broken thumbnail for video items). Not user-blocking on image flow.
AuthContext relies on httpOnly cookie + axios withCredentials; cookies are SameSite=None+Secure which works because public URL is HTTPS. Good.
Static mount /api/uploads via StaticFiles is fine; verified annotated images served with image/* content-type.

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional (UI verified via screenshot; 2 playwright sub-asserts were script-level bugs, not app bugs)

seed_data_creation: Created several test_*@cityeye.io users + a few analyses on the seeded admin sample image; safe to leave or drop.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_cityeye.py pass against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. YOLOv8 inference works (returns vehicles on the unsplash sample). Note: <input type=file data-testid=upload-file-input> has class='hidden' — use set_input_files directly, do NOT wait for visibility. Police nav link is intermittently reported invisible by Playwright is_visible due to layout but the link is rendered (verified in screenshot).
